diff: Where their review of the proposal results in a finding of alignment with the Sky Core Atlas and Launch Agent 6 Artifact, the Operational Facilitator next triggers a Snapshot poll to allow token holders to vote on the proposal. The poll is open for three (3) days. A poll must have at least 10% of the circulating token supply participating and must have 50% of votes in favor to be approved.
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes
